status: exact finite realized-path birth/shell mask-expression and one-generation transition experiment; not a contraction, Post quotient, availability bound, or unconditional theorem

canonical_run.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/far_secant_birth_shell_trace.py run --output /tmp/far-secant-birth-shell-trace-canonical.json

not_available_without_connector_domain_r: aggregate inherited-only bitset/hash and union cardinality when multiple descriptor terms occur
aggregate current-level-only bitset/hash and union cardinality when multiple descriptor terms occur

child_quotient_result.interpretation: The only repeated child keys are zero-poison states. No repeated nonzero state exists, so finite non-falsification supplies no substantive stabilization evidence.

parent_transition_result.interpretation: The parent projection that omits child poison states and child connector choices is refuted twice. Every enriched ordered parent state is a singleton, so sig_1 transition stabilization remains untested.

proved_by_finite_computation: the pinned 42-parent/146-child realized trace admits an exact full/direct/partner-total/direct-only mask identity
the stored correlated descriptors give an exact symbolic inherited/current birth-shell cover without adding overlapping word counts
a parent state omitting its ordered child poison and choice trace is noncongruent in two observed classes
not_proved: a repeated enriched parent transition state
positive connector availability or an unconditional infinite walk
referee_interpretation.next_data_obligation: Obtain an L9 selected construction and exact prefix-aware endpoint-to-other-point closure, or rescan connector domains while retaining raw inherited/current component bitsets, before testing a genuine second-generation transfer or contraction inequality.
